raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A green garlic bunch is on a wooden cutting board. A knife is on the board. The garlic is a flexible plant with stalks and leaves; the knife has a blade and a handle. STRATEGY - Grasp the garlic stalks, transport to the knife blade, and perform a chopping motion. Failure modes include slipping garlic, misaligning with the blade, or incomplete cut. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 grasp garlic stalks (flexible, so grasp the main stalks); Step 2 transport to blade (approach blade); Step 3 chop (press and slide garlic against blade).
Goal: chopped(green_garlic)
Scene: green_garlic, knife, cutting_board
Step 1: grasp(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the main stalks of the green garlic
  contact: holding(green_garlic) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_garlic)
Step 2: transport(green_garlic -> knife)
  affordance_region: the blade of the knife
  spatial: above(green_garlic, knife, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_garlic)
  done_when: above(green_garlic, knife, 0.05)
Step 3: insert(green_garlic -> knife)
  affordance_region: the blade of the knife
  contact: blade_contact(green_garlic, knife) [completion]
  direction: insert_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: blade_contact(green_garlic, knife)
Step 4: push(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the blade of the knife
  contact: blade_contact(green_garlic, knife) [progress]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: blade_contact(green_garlic, knife)
Step 5: release(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the main stalks of the green garlic
  contact: released(green_garlic) [completion]
  done_when: released(green_garlic)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the main stalks of the green garlic
the main stalks of the green garlic
